title: krynitzkia hickmanii
intro: Krynitzkia hickmanii, also known as Hickman's Krynitzkia, is a flowering plant species in the family Boraginaceae. It is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, and has been used to treat various health issues. Herbal preparations of Krynitzkia hickmanii, such as infusions and tinctures, are believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and acting as an antiseptic.
